calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Michael Heath, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Asim Causevic, Elvedin Sabanovic and Samomir Cehic, who were placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defenadnts Esad Golubovic, an individual or Eris General Construction, Inc., a California corporation.
Defaults were entered against defendants on March 25, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 5, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Asim Causevec, Elvedin Sabanovic and Samomir Cehic, and against the Defaulted Defendants Esad Golubovic, an individual, and Eris General Construction, Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $71,633.00.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - $3,487.00.
Costs - $470.00.

Total - $75,590.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
